questionHtml:
What is the major product of the reaction of HBr with but-1-ene?

 

A.   1-bromobutane

B.   2-bromobutane

C.   1,2-dibromobutane

D.   2,2-dibromobutane

meta.title: What is the major product of the reaction of HBr with but-1-ene? A. 1-bromobutane B. 2-bromobutane C. 1,2-dibromobutane D. 2,2-dibromobutane
